name: logic-lens
description: Logic-first code review using semi-formal execution tracing. Surfaces behavioral bugs, type contract breaches, boundary blindspots, and interprocedural semantic mismatches — the logic errors that cause production incidents in syntax-clean code.
author: hyhmrright

commands.description: Logic bug review via semi-formal execution tracing with L1–L9 risk taxonomy
Step-by-step execution path explanation for any function or code block
Semantic equivalence check between two code versions to surface behavioral regressions
Fault localization from a failing test or runtime error back to the root cause
Aggregate logic health dashboard for a codebase with per-module risk scoring
Autonomous audit-and-fix pipeline: after consent, finds logic bugs, applies fixes, verifies them, and reports unresolved items
